name: Form: Add Field

description.en: Add an input field to an existing form.
description.de: Ein Eingabefeld zu einem bestehenden Formular hinzufügen.

bot: Use this to add a field to a form. First fetch the current definition via GET, extend the inputs array, then PATCH with the full updated definition.

inputs.name: Form ID
inputs.bot: The form's ID from the create response. Never ask the user — carry it from the previous step.

inputs.name: Definition
inputs.bot: The full updated warp definition JSON with the new field appended to definition.actions[0].inputs. Carry all existing fields and only append the new one.
